title: The #1 ERP Migration Mistake That Causes Supply Chain Disruption. | Lobster
snippet: Our CEO Tim Srock uses the analogy of DeepL for the supply chain. Your partners speak French. Internally, you switch from English to German. The layer in the middle keeps translating – and nobody on the outside has to learn a new language. Internally, you move from R/3 to S/4HANA on your own schedule ...
